idea-plugin.name: IDE Agent for Copilot
idea-plugin.description:
IDE Agent for Copilot turns GitHub Copilot into a full coding agent inside your JetBrains IDE. Instead of suggesting code in isolation, the agent plans and executes multi-step tasks using the same IDE features you use every day — navigation, refactoring, inspections, testing, build tools, and Git — all within a single conversation.

Why this plugin?

  • 66 IDE-native tools — the agent reads, writes, searches, refactors, builds, tests, and commits through IntelliJ’s own APIs, not regex hacks
  • Direct ACP integration — no sidecar, SDK, or extra server; talks straight to GitHub Copilot CLI
  • Sub-agents — specialized Explore, Task, Code Review, and UI Review agents that run in parallel
  • Full undo support — every file edit goes through IntelliJ’s Document API with native undo/redo
  • Model choice — pick Claude, GPT, or Gemini; see usage multipliers and billing in real time

Code Intelligence

  • Symbol search, find references, go-to-declaration, type hierarchy
  • Class and file outlines, Javadoc/KDoc lookup
  • Text and regex search across the project

Code Quality

  • Run IntelliJ inspections, Qodana, and SonarLint
  • Auto-apply quickfixes and suppress warnings
  • Check compilation errors, optimize imports, format code

Build, Test & Run

  • Incremental build, run tests by class/method/pattern with coverage
  • Create, edit, and run Gradle/JUnit/Application configurations
  • Shell command execution with paginated output

Git

  • Status, diff, log, blame, stage, commit, branch, stash, push
  • All operations go through IntelliJ’s VFS — no buffer desync

Refactoring

  • Rename, extract method, inline, safe-delete via IntelliJ refactoring engine

Chat & Workflow

  • Streaming markdown responses with code blocks and syntax highlighting
  • Context attachments: files, selections, code symbols
  • Plan tree visualization with real-time step progress
  • Timeline view of reasoning, tool calls, and sub-agent activity
  • Quick-reply buttons, conversation export, session history
  • Granular tool permissions (Allow / Ask / Deny per tool)
  • Real-time billing graph with cycle tracking and cost estimates

Developer Tooling

  • Hot-reload plugin from build output without IDE restart
  • Scratch file creation and execution
  • IDE log reader, notification viewer, debug panel

Requirements

  • GitHub Copilot subscription (Free, Pro, Business, or Enterprise)
  • GitHub Copilot CLI installed (npm install -g @githubnext/github-copilot-cli or winget install GitHub.Copilot)
  • IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1 or later
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0

  • Direct ACP integration — removed Go sidecar and SDK dependency
  • Real model listing from Copilot (Claude, GPT, Gemini families)
  • Streaming chat responses via ACP protocol
  • Copilot CLI login flow with auto-detection

0.1.0

  • Initial technical preview release
  • Tool Window with Prompt, Context, Plans, and Timeline views
